data.title: Planet Lunch News
AscendEX has launched MASK (MASKBRC)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: AscendEX (formerly BitMax) has launched BRC20 inscription token MASK (MASKBRC) at 12:00 on February 24, opened MASKBRC/USDT trading pair, and is now open for recharge.
AscendEX (formerly BitMax) is the first and most comprehensive trading platform for Memecoin in the entire network. The Meme Research Institute team under the platform selects high-quality Memes for listing based on on-chain data and project background. The platform's Memecoin first launch rate is as high as 80%.

data.title: BAN 24-hour trading volume exceeds 130 million US dollars, Gate.io ranks first in trading volume
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News CoinGecko data shows that BAN's daily trading volume exceeded 130 million US dollars, and the price exceeded 0.22 US dollars, with an increase of more than 58%. Among them, Gate.io's trading volume exceeded 44.8 million US dollars, accounting for 33.58% of the trading volume, ranking first among exchanges.

data.title: Bedrock completes BTC staking upgrade, users can deposit ETH, USDT and other tokens and mint uniBTC at one time
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bedrock published an announcement on the X platform that BTC staking on Bedrock has completed a major upgrade, and uniBTC on Ethereum and BNB Chain has been launched for exchange and deposit. Users can deposit ETH, USDT, DAI, USDC or BUSD and mint uniBTC at one time.

data.title: BAN briefly broke through 0.25 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 79.25%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News GMGN market data shows that BAN rose briefly to break through 0.25 USDT and is currently trading at 0.255 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 79.25%.

data.title: Alibaba To Invest Over 380 Billion Yuan In Cloud And AI Infrastructure
data.description: According to PANews, Alibaba Group CEO Wu Yongming has announced plans to invest more than 380 billion yuan in cloud and AI hardware infrastructure over the next three years. This investment surpasses the total amount spent in the past decade, highlighting Alibaba's commitment to advancing its technological capabilities.

data.title: From floor to blockchain: how market making became open to all
data.description:
Discover how market making has evolved from NYSE floor traders to decentralized finance (DeFi) protocols like Uniswap.The article From floor to blockchain: how market making became open to all was first published on Crypto Valley Journal.
source: https://cryptovalleyjournal.com/focus/background/from-floor-to-blockchain-how-market-making-became-open-to-all/?utm_campaign=rss_reader&utm_medium=rss&utm_source=feed_source&utm_content=From+floor+to+blockchain%3A+how+market+making+became+open+to+all

data.title: Infini Lianchuang: There was negligence during the transfer of permissions, and the personal private key was not leaked
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Infini co-founder @Christianeth posted on the X platform: "My personal private key has not been leaked, so don't worry too much. I was negligent when transferring the authority before. It is ultimately my responsibility. This has sounded the alarm. Thank you friends for your voice and support. There is no problem with liquidity. We can pay the full amount and are tracing the funds."

data.title: OX.FUN Freezes Funds of User Involved in Oracle Manipulation
data.description:
According to Foresight News, OX.FUN announced that all funds belonging to the user known as Jefe have been frozen due to his involvement in an oracle manipulation attack. The platform clarified that no other user funds were affected by this incident.

Contrary to Jefe's claims of not engaging in any transactions, he conducted a series of trades that violated OX.FUN's terms of service. On February 14, 2025, at 5:38:43 (UTC+8), Jefe made an initial deposit of 1 million USDC. Shortly after, between 5:46:56 and 5:57:06, he began selling large amounts of JAILSTOOL, placing limit orders below the market price, with transactions exceeding $600,000. He continued to manipulate the market by placing additional limit orders when the price was at a reasonable level of 0.05, with trades over $300,000, and further drove the market down to below 0.04 by 6:00. He then closed his position at a low price of 0.034.

OX.FUN stated that Jefe's actions were a clear violation of their terms of service and harmed the interests of other users on the platform, leading to the freezing of his funds. Despite Jefe's attempts to leverage social media pressure to reclaim his profits, OX.FUN has reached out to him, offering to mitigate some of the losses caused by the social media fallout, but Jefe declined the offer.

data.title: Whales Buy 930K Litecoin in 2 Weeks, Will It Hold Above 200EMA?
data.description:
The substantial acquisition of 930,000 Litecoin (LTC) by whales over the past two weeks marked an uptick in large-scale investor confidence in Litecoin.
